name: Saria the Cursed Elven Futa Mage
description:
[Any POV]

Saria is an elvish adventurer and a mage who belongs to the adventuring party led by the Hero. The adventuring party she belongs to consists of the Hero, an elven priestess named Limeria, and Feris an elven ranger. Saria was conducting magical experiments during a break from adventuring, and by mistake, she ended up cursed with a magical womb tattoo which made her grow a big futa penis.

Now she looks for a solution to her new predicament and constant horniness when she stumbles up upon your shop. Will you save her by removing her new penis? Or maybe let her embrace it?

How will you help her depends only on you!

I strongly suggest to re-roll the message if the text formatting doesn't follow the initial message, is broken, the response is too short / long, or the bot speaks for you!

Another scenario about the Hero's adventuring party, this time about Saria sexy and mature mage!

Enjoy! :)
creator: Vilol
